Bus Timings

5 Bus Timings Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Ras, Public Library and Return

July 12, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Alright, let’s talk about Bus 5 in Dubai. It zips all over the place, from Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Ras, and even swings by the Public Library. Trust me, if you’re trying to get around Dubai without emptying your wallet, Bus 5 is your new best friend. It hits up all the hotspots neighborhoods, shopping areas, you name it.

And the best part? These buses are rolling through constantly. So you’re not gonna be left hanging at a bus stop for ages. Whether you’re a local just trying to get to work or a tourist wanting to explore without breaking the bank, Bus 5’s got your back. It’s reliable, it’s everywhere, and it’ll get you where you need to go. Give it a shot next time you’re out and about in Dubai!

Route Name 5
Route Description Abu Hail Bus Station · 2 Al Ras, Public Library Abu Hail Bus Station · 2
Total Distance Approximately 16 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 37 minutes
Operational Hours 06:36 to 23:53 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 5

Bus 5 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 5 operates frequently throughout the day, providing convenient options for passengers. Below are the detailed timings for each direction:

Bus 5 TimetableFor the full schedule, you can check the official RTA website or follow this link for 5 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 5 is set according to Dubai’s standard public transport pricing. A single journey costs AED 3 for a standard ticket. For multi-zone tickets or Nol Card options, passengers should check the latest rates through the RTA Dubai app or at metro stations. Discounts may be available for Nol Card holders and various fare options can cater to different travel needs.

Bus 5 Station Overview

Abu Hail Bus Station · 2

Abu Hail Bus Station · 2 is a vital transportation hub located in the Abu Hail area of Dubai. Serving as a key stop for Bus 5, this station offers convenient connections to various local and city-wide destinations. The station features essential amenities such as seating areas, ticket counters, and real-time schedule displays, ensuring a comfortable and efficient travel experience for passengers. Its strategic location supports smooth connectivity with other bus routes and the Dubai Metro, making it an important point for daily commuters and travelers.

Hor Al Anz, Turnoff 1 Bus Stop Intersection

The Hor Al Anz, Turnoff 1 Bus Stop is a major transit hub where Bus Routes 5, 23, 64, 13B, 13D, and C18 intersect. This central location provides passengers with efficient connections between these diverse routes, facilitating seamless travel across various parts of Dubai. The stop’s strategic placement ensures easy access to multiple destinations, making it a crucial point for commuters navigating the Hor Al Anz area.

Al Ras, Public Library

The Al Ras, Public Library bus stop is an important station for Bus 5, providing access to the Al Ras area and the nearby public library. It is well-connected to the surrounding community, offering convenient transport options for those looking to visit the library or explore the local area. The station features essential facilities for a smooth commuting experience and is strategically placed to enhance accessibility to local services and amenities.

Journey Experience

The 5 bus from Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Ras, Public Library, and back offers a long yet fascinating journey through some of Dubai’s most historic areas. As the bus passes through Deira, passengers can enjoy views of the bustling streets filled with traditional markets like the famous Gold Souk and Spice Souk.

The route continues towards the heart of old Dubai, where Al Ras Public Library, one of the city’s oldest libraries, is located near the Dubai Creek. Despite the longer ride, the route provides a deep dive into the city’s cultural and historical landmarks, making it an enriching experience for those looking to explore beyond modern Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 12, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
